Module com.example.ventana
Package com.example.ventana.model

Class GameLogic

java.lang.Object
com.example.ventana.model.GameLogic
All Implemented Interfaces:
IGameLogic
public class GameLogic extends Object implements IGameLogic
The GameLogic class implements the core rules of the game. It coordinates the progression of levels, time management per level, and word validation by interacting with an IWord implementation and maintaining the game state through an IGameState instance.

Main responsibilities include:

  • Validating user input against the current word.
  • Advancing levels and adjusting time limits accordingly.
  • Generating new words at each level.
  • Resetting the game to its initial state.
Author:
Nerie

  • Constructor Details

    • GameLogic

      public GameLogic(IWord wordManager, IGameState gameState)
      Constructs a new GameLogic instance.
      Parameters:
      wordManager - an implementation of IWord used to generate and manage words.
      gameState - an implementation of IGameState used to store the game state.

  • Method Details

    • validateWord

      public boolean validateWord(String input)
      Validates whether the user input matches the current word.
      Specified by:
      validateWord in interface IGameLogic
      Parameters:
      input - the word entered by the user.
      Returns:
      true if the input matches the current word (case-insensitive), false otherwise.

    • nextLevel

      public void nextLevel()
      Advances the game to the next level.

      Every 5 levels, the time per level is reduced by 2 seconds, provided the time is greater than 2 seconds.

      A new word is generated when moving to the next level.

      Specified by:
      nextLevel in interface IGameLogic

    • resetGame

      public void resetGame()
      Resets the game to its initial state.

      The level is set to 1, the time per level is reset to 20 seconds, and a new word is generated.

      Specified by:
      resetGame in interface IGameLogic

      public int getLevel()
      Returns the current level of the game.
